torso_lean.low_feedback: Torso angle off — lean slightly forward into the header for control and power

knee_bend.low_feedback: Knees should stay closer to fully extended at peak jump — bent knees here suggest mistimed takeoff
Knee angle off — elite volleys keep the striking leg compact through contact, not fully extended or overly bent

torso_lean.low_feedback: Stay more upright and balanced over the ball — excess lean reduces control on a volley strike

knee_bend.low_feedback: Knee angle off — free kicks need a controlled wrap through the ball, not a fully extended or overly bent strike

torso_lean.low_feedback: Torso lean off — lean slightly into the strike for curl and power on a free kick

knee_bend.low_feedback: Knee angle off — power shots need full extension through contact for maximum drive

torso_lean.low_feedback: Torso lean off — lean slightly forward to keep the shot low and powerful

knee_bend.low_feedback: Knee angle off — curl shots need a more controlled, compact strike than a power shot

torso_lean.low_feedback: Torso lean off — lean into the curl for wrap and swerve on the ball
